ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., success, unknown) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code representing any error associated with the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* General category of the event (e.g., System) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Specific subcategory within the event category */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system where the event was logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The exact time when the event occurred */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* The IP address of the source where the event was generated */,
  "target_ip" TEXT /* The IP address of the target involved in the event (if applicable) */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username associated with the event (if applicable) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain name of the user or system involved */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* The process ID of the application or service generating the event */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* The thread ID of the process generating the event */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* The source of the log (e.g., server, workstation) */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* The type of log (e.g., security, system, application) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the event (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data or context related to the event */,
  "is_alert" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is critical and should trigger an alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the alert, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category (e.g., System) */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific subcategory (e.g., Security State Change) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* The type of category (e.g., system, security, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
